patterns.name: ETL Pattern
patterns.use_case: Data View Node -> Script Node -> Interface Node (Write)

patterns.name: Decision Workflow
patterns.use_case: Process -> IF Node -> Branch 1 (Approve) / Branch 2 (Reject) -> Notification

patterns.name: Parallel Processing
patterns.use_case: Process -> Wait Node -> Multiple Asynchronous Nodes -> Combine Results

patterns.name: Iterative Processing
patterns.use_case: While Node -> Data View -> Process Batch -> Update Counter

patterns.name: Transactional Update
patterns.description: Atomic multi-step updates with rollback on error
patterns.use_case: Transaction -> Interface (Update 1) -> Interface (Update 2) -> Rollback Transaction (on error)

patterns.name: UI-Driven Process
patterns.description: Interactive user-driven workflow with screen integration
patterns.use_case: Process -> UI Screen -> While Loop -> User Actions -> Data Processing

patterns.name: ML Integration
patterns.description: Machine learning pipeline with decision routing
patterns.use_case: Data View -> Data Science (Forecast/RCA) -> Decision Logic -> Action Item
